results.rendered_html:
āveśika a. (kī f.) [āveśa-ṭhañ]
1 Peculiar, one's own (asādhāraṇa).
2 Inherent.
— kaḥ A guest, visitor.
— kaṃ
1 Entering into.
2 Hospitality.
